info.title: Ecommerce-buildTime
info.description: API for managing and interacting with the Ecommerce buildTime platform, enabling functionalities for product management, order processing, and user operations.

tags.name: products
tags.description: Operations related to product management, including creating, updating, retrieving, and deleting product information.

tags.name: orders
tags.description: Endpoints for order processing such as placing orders, viewing order status, and managing order history.

tags.name: users
tags.description: User account management operations including registration, authentication, profile updates, and user-related data.

post.description: Registers a new user by accepting user details in the request body. On success, returns the registered user information.

example.message: User data provided is invalid or incomplete
A user with the given email already exists
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Place a new order for a user
post.description: Places an order for the specified user identified by userId path parameter. Returns order details upon successful placement.

example.message: Order request parameters are invalid or missing required information
The user specified by userId does not exist
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.summary: Retrieve details for a specific order
get.description: Fetches detailed information about the order specified by orderId path parameter. Returns order details if found.

example.message: The provided orderId is invalid or malformed
Order with specified orderId does not exist

details.issue: No order matches the given ID

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Add an item to the user's cart
post.description: Adds a new item to the shopping cart for the specified user identified by userId path parameter. The item details are provided in the request body. Returns the updated cart information.

requestBody.description: Item details to add to cart

example.message: The item details provided are invalid

details.issue: Quantity must be greater than zero

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.summary: Get the contents of a user's cart
get.description: Retrieves the current items and details of the shopping cart for the specified user identified by userId path parameter.

example.message: The provided userId is invalid or malformed
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.summary: Track shipping status of an order
get.description: Retrieve the current shipping and tracking status of the specified order by providing its unique orderId. The response provides shipping updates and tracking details to monitor the shipment progress.

404.description: Order not found or shipping details unavailable for the given orderId.

example.message: No shipping information found for orderId: ord-7b3d8f2a

details.issue: Order ID does not exist or no shipping data available

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Add a new product to the catalog
post.description: Create and add a new product by providing all required product details in the request body. This operation ensures the product is stored and available in the inventory.

requestBody.description: Details of the product to be added

example.name: Wireless Mouse
example.description: Ergonomic wireless mouse with adjustable DPI

400.description: Invalid product data supplied in the request body.

example.message: Product name and price are required fields and must be valid.

details.issue: Price must be a positive number

409.description: A product with the same SKU already exists.

example.message: A product with SKU WM-12345 already exists.

details.issue: SKU WM-12345 is already in use

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.description: Endpoint to receive asynchronous webhook notifications from payment gateways regarding payment status updates. The request body contains the event payload sent by the payment provider.

requestBody.description: Webhook payload sent by the payment provider

example.message: Required fields missing or invalid in webhook payload.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.description: Start a payment process by sending required payment details such as amount, currency, and payment method. The response returns a confirmation and status of the initiated payment.

requestBody.description: Payment initiation details including amount, currency, and payment method

example.message: Payment amount must be positive and payment method valid.

details.issue: Amount must be greater than zero

example.message: The payment could not be processed due to insufficient funds.

details.issue: Insufficient funds or payment authorization failed

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

paymentId.description: Unique identifier for the payment transaction.

gatewayResponse.description: Response message from the payment gateway.

transactionId.description: Transaction identifier provided by the payment gateway.

status.description: Current status of the payment transaction.

totalAmount.description: Total amount of the order before discounts.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the order was created.

totalDiscount.description: Total discount applied to the order.

currency.description: Currency code used for the order.

userId.description: Identifier of the user who placed the order.

items.description: List of items included in the order.

payableAmount.description: Final amount to be paid after discounts.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the order was last updated.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user was created.

active.description: Indicates if the user account is active.

userType.description: Type or role of the user.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the user was last updated.

rating.description: Average customer rating for the product.

description.example: Ergonomic wireless mouse with fast scrolling and rechargeable battery.

currency.description: Currency code for the product price.

category.description: Category to which the product belongs.

stock.description: Number of items available in stock.

quantity.description: The number of units ordered for the product

productId.description: Unique identifier for the ordered product

price.description: Original price per unit of the product

discount.description: Discount applied per unit on the product

finalPrice.description: Final price per unit after discount

quantity.description: Number of units of the product in the cart

productId.description: Unique identifier of the product in the cart

price.description: Original price per unit of the product

discount.description: Discount applicable per unit on the product

finalPrice.description: Price per unit after discount is applied

currency.description: Currency code for the price values

productName.description: Name of the product in the cart

lastUpdated.description: Timestamp of the last status update

orderId.description: Unique identifier of the tracked order

courierPartner.description: Name of the courier company handling the delivery

estimatedDelivery.description: Estimated delivery date of the order

status.description: Current delivery status of the order

trackingId.description: Tracking number provided by the courier

totalAmount.description: Total cost of all items before discounts

totalDiscount.description: Sum of all discounts applied to the cart items

currency.description: Currency code for all monetary values

userId.description: Identifier of the user owning the cart

items.description: List of items currently in the user's shopping cart

payableAmount.description: Amount that the user needs to pay after discounts

updatedAt.description: Datetime when the cart was last updated

amount.description: The total amount to be paid

orderId.description: Identifier for the order associated with the payment

paymentMethod.description: The method used to make the payment, e.g., credit card, PayPal

currency.description: Currency code for the payment amount in ISO 4217 format

paymentGateway.description: The payment gateway processing the transaction

country.description: Country of residence of the user

active.description: Indicates whether the user account is active

userType.description: Classification of the user, such as 'admin' or 'customer'

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the payment record was created

amount.description: The total amount that was paid

orderId.description: Identifier of the order related to this payment

paymentId.description: Unique identifier for this payment transaction

paymentMethod.description: Method used to complete the payment

currency.description: The currency used for the payment (ISO 4217 code)

status.description: Current status of the payment, e.g., 'completed', 'pending', 'failed'

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the product was added to the catalog

rating.description: Average customer rating for the product

available.description: Indicates if the product is currently available for purchase

description.example: High-quality wireless headphones with noise cancellation

currency.description: Currency in which the product price is expressed (ISO 4217 code)

category.description: Category to which the product belongs

stock.description: Number of items available in stock

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the product details were last updated

error.description: A short description of the error type

status.description: HTTP status code representing the error

path.description: Request path that generated the error

details.description: Detailed list of validation errors or issues

field.description: The name of the field where the error occurred

issue.description: Description of the issue with the field

error.description: A short description of the error type

status.description: HTTP status code representing the error
